name: Bogeys Golf Simulator
about: Bogeys Golf Simulator is a venue offering a unique golf simulator experience in Brownsville, TN. They use Protee VX Simulator technology with high-speed cameras and Artificial Intelligence to provide speed and accuracy for a virtual golf experience. The venue is accessible 24/7, 365 days a year, allowing players to book by the hour for up to 8 players per session. Players can choose from over 500 prestige golf courses worldwide or practice solo with provided clubs if needed. Bogeys features a lounge area for relaxation and socializing, along with snacks and drinks available for purchase. Membership options are available for discounted rates.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to over 500 prestigious golf courses worldwide
Protee VX Simulator technology with high-speed cameras and AI
Club rentals available for players without their own set
Lounge area for socializing and relaxation
Membership options with discounted hourly rates

food_and_drink.notes: Snacks and drinks available for purchase.
BYOB is allowed as per 'feel free to bring your own'.

simulator_hardware.notes: High-speed cameras and AI for speed and accuracy.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, Bogeys provides clubs for players to use if you don't have your own set.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, you are welcome to bring your own food and drinks. Bogeys also offers snacks and drinks for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A typical 18-hole round takes approximately 2 hours and 15 minutes.

faq.question: Is Bogeys kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Bogeys is kid-friendly with a lounge area available for children to relax during their turn or while watching.
